dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal specifies RSI(8) but only rsi_7, rsi_14, rsi_21 are available. Used rsi_7 as closest match. Entry window of 5 days maximum is captured in hold_days_max. Direction is LONG (buy condition); SHORT exit omitted as signal is directional.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal specifies RSI(8) but only rsi_7, rsi_14, rsi_21 are available. Used rsi_7 as closest match. Entry window of 5 days maximum is captured in hold_days_max. Direction is LONG (buy condition); SHORT exit omitted as signal is directional.

source_rule_text: Buy when RSI(8) falls below 30; sell when RSI(8) rises above 70, with a maximum 5-day window to enter after the initial signal.
